new_classes.label_en: still other fermented beverage of heading 2206 (CN 2206 00 39)
new_classes.label_de: Andere gegorene Getränke, nicht schäumend, KN 2206 00 39
new_classes.definition_en: A still (non-sparkling) other fermented beverage classifiable under CN subheading 2206 00 39, including the products listed in HS Explanatory Note to heading 2206, second paragraph, (1) to (10), that are not sparkling. This includes fermented beverages such as cider, perry, mead, and other fermented beverages not elsewhere specified, presented in a non-sparkling form.

coverage_explanation: The legal note for CN 2206 00 39 (and the sibling range 22060031–22060089) states that this subheading covers "other" fermented beverages as described in the HS Explanatory Note to heading 2206, second paragraph, points (1) to (10). The key discriminating criterion within the 2206 00 31/39 group is that the beverages are still (non-sparkling), as opposed to CN 2206 00 31 (which covers still fermented beverages in containers ≤ 2 L) vs 2206 00 39 (still in containers > 2 L). The axiom captures the "still" (non-carbonated) quality and places the class under OtherFermentedBeverage2206. However, the HS EN second paragraph (1)–(10) enumeration of product types (e.g. cider, perry, mead, sake, etc.) is not individually modelled here, nor is the container-volume distinction between 2206 00 31 (≤ 2 L) and 2206 00 39 (> 2 L) — this would require a someValuesFrom restriction on LargeContainer, which the TBox supports but the legal note text only implies implicitly from the sibling structure. The enumeration of HS EN product types cannot be captured without additional classes for each product. Coverage is therefore partial.
